verses.text: Ephraim chides Jephthah for not calling them to war. Strife. The proud feel slighted.
Ephraim chides Jephthah for not calling them to war. Strife. The proud feel slighted.
Ephraim chides Jephthah for not calling them to war. Strife. The proud feel slighted.
Gilead fights Ephraim; 'Shibboleth' betrays the fugitives. Shibboleth. A word reveals them.
Gilead fights Ephraim; 'Shibboleth' betrays the fugitives. Shibboleth. A word reveals them.

Jephthah judges Israel six years and dies. Jephthah. His season ends.
Ibzan of Bethlehem judges seven years. Ibzan. A quiet judge.
Ibzan of Bethlehem judges seven years. Ibzan. A quiet judge.

Elon judges Israel ten years. Elon. Another season of rest.
Elon judges Israel ten years. Elon. Another season of rest.
Abdon judges eight years. Abdon. The minor judges pass.
Abdon judges eight years. Abdon. The minor judges pass.
